{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324004419030DCB43CB892DAD976C"}"},"total":399},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7549261678603797273","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了前边挺好看的，不是那种慢慢升级的文，直接无敌然后游戏人间，作者文笔和剧情写的都挺好，不会写成大家不想看的那种无敌文，还是个人，有自己的喜好，想干嘛就干嘛，就是还是想看古代，听说后边写动漫了，动漫我又不看，代入不了所以4星","text_exts":[{"e":43,"s":40,"text":"都挺好","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%83%BD%E6%8C%BA%E5%A5%BD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742842592DAD976C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227549261678603797273%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227513076260889709630%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%83%BD%E6%8C%BA%E5%A5%BD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757705954,"group_id":"7513076260889709630","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"？","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2ayKm2Zvh/fS622/4Peo188ZNzL4EOylCGEe3sbW9LQ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3375934649940620","user_name":"玥裔&"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3375934649940620","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7513076260889709630","book_info":{"abstract":"【无敌爽文+多多多女主+幕后大佬+诸天穿越+魔改世界】
如果你获得穿越世界的能力，你会做什么？
凌帆获得概念级穿越能力。
第一反应就是要把曾经的幻想一一实现！
作为一个俗透的人，力量、财富、寿命、女人，凌帆通通想要。
绝不不隐藏自己欲望，肆意妄为的活着！
影视动漫中的女神，现实中的可望不可及的美女……
气运之子的交锋，武学的奥秘……
都在一次次的穿越中获得！
“所以你的第一站……选择……就这……”
